name: Party Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry cereals and pretzel sticks to make 9 cups.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together apple juice, Worcestershire sauce, and seasonings.
3. Brush half of the liquid mixture over the dry cereal mixture and toss to coat.
4. Microwave on high for 3 minutes. Stir, then brush on an additional quarter of the liquid mixture.
5. Transfer the coated cereal mixture to a greased baking dish and bake at 300°F (150°C) for 15-20 minutes, stirring halfway through. Continue baking until the desired crunchiness is reached (approximately 30 minutes total).
6. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
No calorie information available, but this recipe serves approximately 8 people.
